CustomField.description: Formula (design §2.1/§2.3): VS_Total_Capacity__c - VS_Walk_In_Reserve_Count__c. The portion of session capacity online/staff bookings may draw from; VS-06 distributes this total evenly across the session's generated VS_Slot__c rows (A-005) so sum(Slot.Capacity) == this value.
CustomField.label: Bookable Capacity
